LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.InventoryModeT: Shows only items held in valid player storage on this storage unit's map, plus items enabled in the current draft. Batch actions affect only the current search results. Loose recognition can be enabled in mod settings.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.AllModeTip: Shows every registered item in the current category. Batch actions retain the framework's original behavior.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.WarehouseStock: Total quantity on the storage unit's map under the current recognition mode; excludes the unit's internal virtual inventory. Strict mode counts valid storage only; loose mode counts player-usable non-forbidden items.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.RefreshTip: Force-rebuild the inventory snapshot for this storage unit's map and update the summary and warehouse stock column. Category, mode, and search text are kept.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.SummaryTip: Inventory candidate kinds / registered kinds in the current category. The summary ignores search text; candidates include map stock plus currently enabled draft items.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Settings.Loose: When enabled, counts all player-usable, non-forbidden spawned items on the current map, even outside valid storage. Still excludes other maps, unspawned carried/equipped items, and framework storage-unit virtual inventory.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Settings.Stric: When disabled, strict mode is used: only items in valid player storage locations are counted.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Perf.SnapshotR: Inventory snapshot rebuilt: map={mapId} mode={mode} scanned={scanned} kinds={kinds} ms={ms} cacheTicks={cacheTicks}
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Error.MissingT: Required framework members could not be found: {targets}. The affected enhancements were safely disabled; the original goods manager remains available.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Error.RuntimeF: An enhancement failed: {error}. Falling back to the framework's original behavior; this error is logged only once per run.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Error.PatchAll: Applying Harmony patches failed: {error}. Add-on enhancements were stopped; the framework's original window remains available.
LanguageData.RSMF.GoodsManager.AutoTrimNotice: Inventory capacity trimmed {trimmed} items to fit storage limit.
LanguageData.RSMF.InventoryGoodsFilter.Settings.Enabl: When on, colony hauling mechs (e.g. Lifter) can be assigned to the shop Restocker role and actually perform restocking. Off restores the original framework behavior.
